---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: cntrout
---

## What didn't work

One or two sentences. What was supposed to happen, what actually happened.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## What you saw

Paste the actual output, error message, or unexpected behavior.

## Environment

- OS: (macOS X.Y / Linux distro X / Windows + WSL)
- Claude Code version: (`claude --version`)
- Repo commit: (`git rev-parse --short HEAD` in the cloned repo)

## Anything else

Context, screenshots, related issues.
